title: Indulgent Canadian fromage-blanc Pasta
description: A creamy, briny, and nostalgic dish featuring fromage-blanc, perfect for a weeknight dinner. Made with macrobiotic-friendly ingredients and cooked in a traditional Moroccan clay vessel.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the quinoa pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
Reserve 1 cup of the pasta water and then drain the quinoa pasta.
In a large saucepan, heat the coconut oil over low heat.
Add the fromage-blanc and whisk until smooth, slowly pouring in the reserved pasta water to create a creamy emulsion.
Stir in the lemon juice, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Add the cooked quinoa pasta to the saucepan and toss to coat with the fromage-blanc sauce.
Stir in the chopped fresh dill and chives.
Transfer the pasta to a traditional Moroccan clay tajine vessel or a serving dish.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional fresh dill and chives if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers in an airtight container for up to 3 days.
